entries.speaker: sable
lines:
Right. So. Everything's terrible. Just... establishing
that baseline.

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
Edren's gone. Lira's gone. Torren's back in the
Wilds. Maren left a note and vanished. Cael is... Cael.

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
And I'm still here. The thief with no particular
talents except being too stubborn to leave.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Guess that'll have to be enough.
